title: Apodokimos Penalty Propagation Specification
description: Machine-readable specification for retraction cascade algorithm (P-08)

propagation_algorithm.description: P-08: Cascade algorithm for dependent claims
propagation_algorithm.pseudocode:
propagate_retraction(c_retracted, G):
  affected = {}
  queue = direct_dependents(c_retracted, G)
  
  while queue not empty:
    c_dep = dequeue(queue)
    penalty = compute_penalty(c_dep, c_retracted, G)
    apply_penalty(c_dep, penalty)
    affected.insert(c_dep)
    
    if W(c_dep) < threshold_Θ:
      queue.extend(direct_dependents(c_dep, G))
  
  return affected

compute_penalty.description: Penalty proportional to how load-bearing the retracted claim was

threshold_Θ.description: Retraction cascade threshold — continue propagation if W falls below

rationale: Makes retraction structurally consequential — not punishment but accurate signal propagation. Graph corrects itself.

sbt_consequences.description: Researcher SBT scores decremented proportionally to contribution to retracted claims

submitter_multiplier.description: Submitter bears larger penalty than attesters
